strat_litho_wellbore_core.reason: Core subset of formation tops - data available via WellboreCore

wellbore_core_photo_aggr.reason: Aggregated view of wellbore_core_photo - no unique data

seismic_acquisition_licence.reason: Seismic permit data - not a graph relationship, company-specific permits

_global.OBJECTID: ArcGIS sequential row counter - not a meaningful ID
_global.Shape__Area: ArcGIS computed - derivable from WKT geometry
_global.Shape__Length: ArcGIS computed - derivable from WKT geometry
_global.*FactPageUrl: URL links to Sodir website - not needed in graph
_global.*FactMapUrl: URL links to Sodir map views

wellbore.csv.wlbNsDeg: DMS latitude degrees - redundant with geometry/lat/lon
wellbore.csv.wlbNsDecDeg: Decimal degrees latitude - redundant with computed latitude
wellbore.csv.wlbEwDecDeg: Decimal degrees longitude - redundant with computed longitude
wellbore.csv.wlbUtmZone: UTM zone - redundant with WGS84 conversion
wellbore.csv.wlbGeodeticDatum: Geodetic datum reference - all converted to WGS84
wellbore.csv.wlbNamePart1: Parsed well name component 1 - redundant with wlbWellboreName

facility.csv.fclNsDeg: DMS latitude degrees - redundant with geometry
